notes: Zapier polls Twilio's REST resources. Twilio's native push mechanism is a webhook URL configured on the phone number — that's the recommended pattern in OpenFn for incoming SMS/calls.

triggers.name: New Call
triggers.description: Fires when a new call is received.

triggers.name: New Recording
triggers.description: Fires when a new recording is available.

triggers.name: New SMS
triggers.description: Fires when a new SMS is received.
